api_key.description: Clarifai personal access token (PAT). Sent as 'Authorization: Key <api_key>'; never logged.

user_id.description: Clarifai user id all streams are scoped under (users/{user_id}/...).

base_url.description: Clarifai API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
